title: Spino inflicts 2x Atk damage near water

card.rawText: This creature inflicts 2x Atk damage to any creature in or near water.

plan.title: Spino inflicts 2x Atk damage near water
plan.summary: Battle Spino against a creature marked in or near water and verify a 2x attack damage multiplier is observed.

notes: Place Spino on player_1 field as primary.
Treat the opposing creature as in or near water for this fixture.

steps: Resolve a hit and damage roll.
Verify the 2x near-water attack damage multiplier.
manualVerification: The multiplier should only apply to creatures in or near water.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to deterministic headless coverage for this parsed effect.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_035_spino-035-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
